title: claytonia peruviana
intro: Claytonia peruviana, also known as Miner's lettuce or Winter purslane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia peruviana include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Claytonia peruviana can be consumed as a salad green, used in herbal teas, or prepared as a tincture or capsule, offering a versatile and natural way to incorporate its medicinal properties into one's diet.
